title: Refactor validate_age/1 and validate_email/1 to use guards
prompt: Refactor MyApp.Validator.validate_age/1 and validate_email/1 from test_fixtures/bad_guards.ex. Both currently have `if is_binary(...)` / `if is_integer(...)` inside the body. Push type checks into `when` guard clauses on the function heads. Each function should have a guarded success clause plus a catch-all clause that returns `{:error, :invalid_age}` or `{:error, :invalid_email}`. Output the complete refactored module as `defmodule MyApp.Validator do ... end` including both functions.
tier_rationale: Canonical if-in-body → guard refactor. Pattern well-known.
